records.ety: [L. assignatio, fr. assignare: cf. F. assignation.]

defs: The act of assigning or allotting; apportionment.
quotes: This order being taken in the senate, as touching the appointment and assignation of those provinces.

defs: An appointment of time and place for meeting or interview; -- used chiefly of love interviews, and now commonly in a bad sense.
quotes: While nymphs take treats, or assignations give.

defs: A making over by transfer of title; assignment.
